zh.lifeSummary: 當Llywelyn Hirfain ap Gruffydd於大約1370年出生在英國威爾斯布雷康史爾維艾諾時，他的父親Gruffydd ap Iorwerth27歲，母親Angharad ferch Dafydd23歲。他於大約1422年與Mrs. Llywelyn Hirfain ap Gruffudd Fychan在英國威爾斯波斯結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1434年之後。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Llywelyn Hirfain ap Gruffydd于大约1370年出生在英国威尔斯布雷康史爾維艾諾时，他的父亲Gruffydd ap Iorwerth27岁，母亲Angharad ferch Dafydd23岁。他于大约1422年与Mrs. Llywelyn Hirfain ap Gruffudd Fychan在英国威尔斯波斯结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1434年之后。

nameMeanings.name: Gruffydd
meanings: Welsh: The Welsh name; from creffydd, strong faith, or strong in faith. Gruffydd, a Welsh form of Gryffydd.

nameMeanings.name: Llywelyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Llewelyn
meanings: Traditional: altered form (influenced by llew ‘lion’) of Llywelyn, an ancient name of uncertain derivation. It probably goes back to the Old Celtic name Lugobelinos, the first element of which is Lugu- (the name of a god; see Lleu ); the second is a name-forming element found also in names such as Cunobelinus (Cymbeline). The name was borne by Llywelyn ap Iorwerth ( 1173–1240 ) and his grandson Llywelyn ap Gruffydd ( d. 1282 ), Welsh princes who for a time united their countrymen in North Wales and led opposition to the power of the Norman barons in South Wales and the Marches.

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of any of the names beginning with this syllable.

variants.name: Alexander
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

variants.name: Alan
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

variants.name: Albert
meanings: From an Old French name, Albert, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from adal ‘noble’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, displacing the Old English form Æþelbeorht. The name is popular in a variety of forms in Western Europe, and has been traditional in a number of European princely families. It was out of favour in England for centuries, however, and the revival of its popularity in the 19th century was largely in honour of Queen Victoria's consort, Prince Albert of Saxe-Coburg-Gotha .

en.lifeSummary: When Llywelyn Hirfain ap Gruffydd was born about 1370, in Vaynor, Breconshire, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Gruffydd ap Iorwerth, was 27 and his mother, Angharad ferch Dafydd, was 23. He married Mrs. Llywelyn Hirfain ap Gruffudd Fychan about 1422, in Powys, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died after 1434.

Il a épousé Mrs. Llywelyn Hirfain ap Gruffudd Fychan environ 1422, à Powys, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé après 1434.

Er hat um 1422 in Powys, Wales, United Kingdom Mrs. Llywelyn Hirfain ap Gruffudd Fychan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb nach 1434.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Llywelyn Hirfain ap Gruffydd è nato il circa 1370 nel Vaynor, Breconshire, Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Gruffydd ap Iorwerth, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Angharad ferch Dafydd, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Mrs. Llywelyn Hirfain ap Gruffudd Fychan circa 1422, nel Powys, Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì dopo il 1434.

ja.lifeSummary: Llywelyn Hirfain ap Gruffyddが約1370年にイギリスウェールズブレコンシュアイアヴァイノーで生まれた時，父Gruffydd ap Iorwerthは27歳，母Angharad ferch Dafyddは23歳であった。約1422年にイギリスウェールズポウイスでMrs. Llywelyn Hirfain ap Gruffudd Fychanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1434年以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Llywelyn Hirfain ap Gruffydd(이)가 대략 1370년 영국 웨일스 브레콘실르 베이너에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gruffydd ap Iorwerth(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Angharad ferch Dafydd(은)는 23세였다. 그는 대략 1422년 영국 웨일스 파우이스에서 Mrs. Llywelyn Hirfain ap Gruffudd Fychan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1434년 이후 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Llywelyn Hirfain ap Gruffydd родился около 1370 г. в местности веинор, брекуншир, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Gruffydd ap Iorwerth было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Angharad ferch Dafydd, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs. Llywelyn Hirfain ap Gruffudd Fychan около 1422 г. в местности поуис, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер после 1434 г.
